comment: Model registry — the single data source for selectable Claude models, pricing, and thinking behavior. Verified against the claude-api reference 2026-07-03. Add/override entries WITHOUT code changes via the asdlc_app_setting key 'model_registry_custom' (JSON array merged over this file by id; {"id":X,"remove":true} hides an entry). Fields: tier=reasoning|balanced|fast, status=active|legacy|deprecated|retired, thinking_style=adaptive|always_on|budget, explicit_off=true when the API runs thinking by default so 'off' must be sent explicitly, efforts=supported output_config.effort values (empty = no effort param), pricing=USD per 1M tokens.

models.notes: Thinking always on (cannot be disabled — omit the thinking param). Requires 30-day data retention; may return stop_reason 'refusal'.

Adaptive thinking runs by default when the param is omitted — 'off' requires an explicit disabled. Intro pricing $2/$10 per MTok through 2026-08-31; standard rates seeded here. New tokenizer (~30% more tokens vs Sonnet 4.6).
Previous-generation Opus; still active on the API. Prefer claude-opus-4-8 for new configuration.
No 'xhigh' effort on this model (clamped to 'high').
No output_config.effort support; extended thinking uses budget_tokens. 200K context.
